text: Deletion: Fattal Hotel Group does not intend to make an offer for PPHE, which has concluded its formal sales process
New offeror: Genel Energy makes recommended offer, after approach from Alamadiyaf al-Masiyyah
Reabold Resources plc makes £6m all share offer
Segro will sell three major UK logistics parks to a new joint venture for £1bn
Alamadiyaf al-Masiyyah's PUSU deadline extended to 29 July
